overall_assessment.summary: 498 impressions (7d), 0 clicks. Position improving (26.9) but the #1 priority page ($20k loan blog) has NOT been recrawled since Jun 4 — fixes deployed Jun 17 are invisible to Google. URL Inspection API working again is the one bright spot. Without recrawl, no measurable improvement is possible. All other metrics are stable or slightly positive. Phase 31 freeze holds — monitoring only.
